title: Life Contract
description: This project adds a book called "Contract with Life". You can use it to right-click on other creatures to join their faction, thereby protecting yourself from their attacks. Right-clicking on them again will cancel this action.
body: This project adds a book called "Contract with Life". You can use it to right-click on other creatures to join their faction, thereby protecting yourself from their attacks. Right-clicking on them again will cancel this action.
